description: A surface's own code attempts window.top.location assignment to forcibly navigate the host page, bypassing the advisory bridge.navigate_intent channel entirely -- the host page constructed the mount's iframe with a sandbox attribute excluding allow-top-navigation, so the navigation attempt is structurally blocked by the browser's own sandbox enforcement before any bridge message, host-page logic, or origin check is even involved.

expected.blocked_by: browser sandbox enforcement (structural), not application-level bridge logic
